message:
feat(frame): add Series.align(), combine_first(), reindex() with join mode support

fp-index: Add AlignMode enum (Inner/Left/Right/Outer) and align(),
align_inner(), align_left() functions alongside existing align_union().

fp-frame: Add Series.align(other, mode) returning aligned pair,
Series.combine_first(other) for null-filling from another Series,
and Series.reindex(new_labels) for label remapping with null fill.

Closes bd-2gi.15. 23 new tests, 313 total pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
